allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d SRM -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Supplier' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'SupplierID'" -C)
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d SRM -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'User' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'UserID'" -C)

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -d SRM -Q "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS SupplierUserCount FROM SupplierUser; SELECT su.SupplierID, u.UserCode, u.UserName, su.IsMainAccount FROM SupplierUser su JOIN [User] u ON u.UserID = su.UserID" -C)
